title: Scalar Products from a Figure
body: Vectors from the figure (angles from $$+x$$ axis): $$A=10.0$$ at 30°, $$B=5.0$$ at 127°, $$C=12.0$$ at 300°, $$D=20.0$$ at 217°, $$F=20.0$$ at 210°. Find: (a) $$A C$$, (b) $$A F$$, (c) $$D C$$, (d) $$A \left(F+2C\right)$$, (e) $$i B$$, (f) $$j B$$, (g) $$\left(3i-j\right) B$$, (h) $$B B$$.
